description_for_human: Retrieve citation context and paper relationships.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user needs citation graphs, related-paper context, or author influence information for scientific papers.

functions.name: search_semantic_scholar_papers
functions.description: Search Semantic Scholar for papers, related works, and citation context for a scientific topic.

query.description: Scientific query, topic, or paper title.

limit.description: Maximum number of papers to return.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_semantic_scholar_citation_graph
functions.description: Retrieve citation relationships and influential references for a paper.

paper_id.description: Semantic Scholar paper identifier or DOI.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_semantic_scholar_author_profile
functions.description: Retrieve author profile details and influential work metadata.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

tools.name: search_semantic_scholar_papers

query.description: Scientific query, topic, or paper title.

limit.description: Maximum number of papers to return.

tools.description: Retrieve citation relationships and influential references for a paper.
